description: Realistic balanced payload. All 4 rating buckets present for overall, all clusters have numeric averageAchievedScore, all auditee type categories have mixed ratings. Scores vary between 70 and 88.
Realistic balanced payload. All 4 rating buckets present for overall, all clusters have numeric averageAchievedScore, all auditee type categories have mixed ratings. Scores vary between 70 and 88.
Poor rating accounts for 60% or more of total schedules in overallPerformanceDistribution. Most cluster items also show Poor > 50%. averageAchievedScore values are low (below 65 for all clusters).

Excellent rating accounts for 70% or more of total schedules in overallPerformanceDistribution. All clusters show averageAchievedScore above 88. auditeeLevelHotspots items all have Poor scheduleCount = 0.
Poor scheduleCount is exactly 0 across all rating distributions (overall, all clusters, all auditee types, all auditees). percentOfTotal for Poor must be 0.0 everywhere.
All averageAchievedScore fields are empty string '' (non-computable) across all clusters and auditee types and auditees. scheduleCount and ratingDistribution data is still fully populated.
clusterLevelPerformance.totalClusters is exactly 1. items[] contains only one cluster with scheduleCount equal to totalRecords. All other sections remain normally populated.
auditeeTypeAnalysis.totalAuditeeTypes is exactly 1. items[] contains only one auditee type (e.g. Branch) covering all schedules. auditeeLevelHotspots still has 5+ items.
One cluster has 90%+ of all schedules. One auditee type has 85%+ of all schedules. Top auditee in hotspots has scheduleCount 5x higher than the second auditee.
Top 3 auditees in auditeeLevelHotspots have identical scheduleCount AND identical averageAchievedScore. All three show exactly the same Poor percent. Tests how narrator handles ties.
